subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The Sun of Truth, the Luminary of the Supreme Kingdom, for the unity of thoughts and opinions... hearken with heart and soul unto 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء شمس حقیقت نیر ملکوت اعلی بجهت اتحاد عقاید و آراء... عبدالبهآء را به جان و دل گوش نمائید
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @unity of thought and belief, @contention and conflict
